The upgrade seam is an invitation, never a lock (dashed border, quiet). Family products render friendly whether present or absent — absence is one copy-able install line, never an error tone.
brokkr v0.5.1 · free tier · fully local · works forever◇ Upgrade / Connect →

skuld

Scheduler — scripts, reports & maintenance toward your agents.

saga

Not installed — and that's fine. One line brings it up:

curl -fsSL mythicalos.ai/saga | sh
